mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.super_admin, u.remark from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = u.dept_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.deleted = 0
select * from sys_user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1
